integration.reason: Requires ASGI TestClient with lifespan — deferred

security.note: Auth tests cover token validation; SMTP rate limiting tested in unit

e2e.reason: Design spec: manual smoke tests only, no live IMAP in CI

known_gaps.description: Pydantic field constraints (ge, le, Literal) not directly tested — validated indirectly via contract tests
Lifespan startup, health check via HTTP, tool dispatch through MCP layer untested — requires full ASGI test harness
Some error branches (folder not found, body fetch failed) and markdown format edge cases remain uncovered
reply_tool UID-not-found path, SMTP error paths in send/reply remain uncovered

history.summary: Filled 12 of 18 gaps in 1 iteration. Added test_auth (7), test_formatters (16), test_contracts (14), test_helpers (17). Coverage 37% → 53%. No source bugs found.

Filled remaining 5 medium-priority gaps. Added test_tools_deep (11): get_message happy paths (plain, HTML strip, not found, headers), search_messages (query + filters), list_messages markdown, get_thread, move_message, reply_tool with threading, set_flags edge cases. Coverage 53% → 78%. No source bugs found.
